title: On (ONON) Q3 2025 Earnings Results
text: On Holding reported Q3 2025 earnings results that demonstrated continued strong momentum and margin expansion. The company reported record gross margins and strong revenue growth despite a moderating growth rate from historical levels. Management raised full-year 2025 guidance following strong Q3 performance, expecting constant currency net sales growth of 34% year-over-year. Net income and adjusted EBITDA reached new highs, reflecting the company's ability to sustain profitability while growing revenue. The results highlighted On's successful execution of its growth strategy including brand partnerships, international expansion, and margin expansion. Looking forward, the company guided for continued growth in 2026, though at a moderating pace of at least 23% on constant currency basis.
